title: jj / worktree isolation rails
commands_run: moon run ontarch:validate (negative: isolation.mode=trunk -> FAIL, then restore -> PASS)
outcome: profile.schema.json gains an [isolation] object (mode enum worktree|branch|main + jj enum opt-in|default|off). workspace-dev + agent-safe-maintenance = worktree/opt-in; docs-only = branch/opt-in. ontarch_profile_record carries isolation_mode + isolation_jj; _validate_profiles enforces the mode enum. docs/agent-rails.md documents the worktree-isolation rail and jj-opt-in. E07 complete (S1-S6).
validation: moon run ontarch:validate PASS; profiles.json shows isolation_mode/isolation_jj per profile. Negative test: isolation.mode=trunk made validate FAIL with the enum error, PASS after restore.
decisions: default isolation is a git worktree/branch, never the main worktree
jj is opt-in per profile, never the default
token_note: isolation reduces the context surface to the scoped branch; expressed as one profile field, no per-session prose
